title: 3 Shark Facts That Sound Fake

segments.text: Sharks are older than trees, older than Saturn's rings, and older than the North Star.
And that is just the beginning.
Some sharks can sense a single drop of blood in a hundred liters of water.
The Greenland shark can live for over four hundred years.
Sharks also have no bones at all. Their skeleton is made entirely of cartilage.
And they survived five mass extinctions, including the one that killed the dinosaurs.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Sharks are older than trees and can live 400 years. The ocean is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
